landing.heroTitle: Measure students' cognitive skills with assessments grounded in research.
landing.heroSubtitle: CogniTest brings structured evaluations together for students, teachers, and school leadership. Actionable results, a shared view of strengths and needs, and clearer pedagogical decisions.
landing.subtitle: Cognitive assessment platform
landing.taglinePremium: Cognitive assessment in the service of pedagogical clarity.
landing.ctaMicro: No obligation · Rigorous data practices · Built for schools
landing.valueTitle: One platform to make classroom observations measurable.
landing.valueBody: Unlike generic tools or surveys without a scientific frame, CogniTest draws on batteries and paradigms from cognitive research. You do not replace professional judgment—you support it with indicators that can be compared over time and across groups, to adjust pathways, support, and family communication.
landing.valueAngle: From research and protocols to results your whole educational team can read—not only specialists.
landing.benefitsTitle: What CogniTest brings to your school
landing.benefit1Desc: Identify profiles of strengths and difficulties with objective benchmarks, so you can prioritise interventions and track impact over time.
landing.benefit2Desc: One framework for students, teachers, and leadership: role-appropriate dashboards, fewer misunderstandings, better alignment.
landing.benefit3Desc: Structured flows, consolidated results, and usable summaries for councils, support plans, and reporting.
landing.benefit4Desc: Assessments anchored in the scientific literature support transparency and the legitimacy of your choices with families and authorities.
landing.benefit5Desc: From targeted screening to longitudinal follow-up—one platform for your assessment cycles without tool sprawl.
landing.howTitle: Four steps from scoping to action
landing.step1Desc: Together we define goals (screening, follow-up, school-wide project) and the populations involved.
landing.step2Desc: Workspace setup, role assignment, and scheduling of sessions to match how you operate.
landing.step3Desc: Students complete tasks in a secure environment; results are centralised automatically.
landing.step4Desc: Summaries for leadership and teams, with benchmarks to adjust pathways and document follow-up.
landing.stepSupportNote: Optional short training for your key contacts.
landing.trustTitle: Trust, research, and an institutional fit
landing.trust1Body: Protocols and tasks informed by cognitive psychology and the learning sciences.
landing.trust2Body: Designed for how institutions work: role management, traceability, and processes you already use.
landing.trust3Body: Results inform decisions; they do not replace them. Documentation on what each task measures.
landing.faq1Q: Which levels or ages is CogniTest suited to?
landing.faq1A: The platform is designed to flex to your school's needs. Initial scoping helps choose the right tasks and populations for your context.
landing.faq2A: Educational teams get readable summaries; pedagogical interpretation stays with you, supported by objective benchmarks for internal and family dialogue.
landing.faq3Q: How does CogniTest fit our school plan?
landing.faq3A: Comparable indicators over time support steering, evaluating initiatives, and coherence between leadership, teams, and students.
landing.footerClosingTitle: Ready to support your decisions with evidence?
landing.footerClosingHint: Open the demo environment or create an account for your team.
landing.signInHint: Use demo credentials to explore the platform, or register for a new account.
landing.demoHint: Register first, then sign in. Demo data is stored under /data on the server.
landing.footerBlurb: CogniTest — cognitive assessment for schools. Developed within an academic research context, including at ENS Fès.
